typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Cross-surface tests still validate Settings→Dashboard/Popover propagation via store reads and direct state mutation instead of asserting rendered Dashboard/Popover indicators driven by real UI switch actions.
Rapid-switch launch tests invoke launch services with explicit profile IDs without exercising committed active-profile routing after a switch chain, so VAL-CROSS-004/009 evidence remains incomplete.
Prior CTA/navigation and runtime-log blockers from integration-hardening-add-ui-level-cross-surface-contract-tests are not resolved by the launch-only fix commit.
Fix commit provides validation artifacts but no persistent code/project hardening changes, so prior cross-surface contract gaps remain unresolved.
Runtime secret-safety tests do not capture/inspect emitted startup/sync logs; assertions are mostly store/redactor-helper level and can miss callsite logging regressions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require VAL-CROSS UI-evidence fixes to assert rendered Dashboard/Popover state transitions and indicator propagation via user-action paths, not store-only assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature integration-hardening-cross-surface-ui-actionable-assertions still failed while using store-level checks for propagation and direct active-state mutation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce followedProcedure=true only when handoff includes required context-read evidence and full validation stack evidence (not just scoped xcodebuild runs).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple integration-hardening fix reviews reported followedProcedure=true while missing context-read commands and required validation/smoke coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit known-constraint note that stale DerivedData can hide scoped test discovery; require fresh derivedDataPath evidence when a fix is specifically about test discovery.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature integration-hardening-verify-cli-launch-chain-test-discovery reported discovery behavior tied to cache state, but AGENTS known constraints do not currently document this pitfall.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat observations that followedProcedure lacked context-read evidence in individual reviews.
Architecture-level note that active profile should drive launches.
